2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWENSON, ERIK CATLETT, LINDA WYMORE, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT ROMAN SHADE COMPANY OF SAN MATEO EWM CORPORATION DBA THE ROMAN SHADE COMPANY MINTO, MARGARET LESLIE MINTO, EDGAR DOES 1 TO 25

REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ROMAN SHADE COMPANY OF SAN MATEO, EWM CORPORATION DBA THE ROMAN SHADE COMPANY, MARGARET MINTO AND EDGAR MINTO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 5, 2013 ON THE COURT'S MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROMAN SHADE COMPANY OF SAN MATEO, EWM CORPORATION DBA THE ROMAN SHADE COMPANY, MARGARET MINTO AND EDGAR MINTO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE GENERAL DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION AND THE SPECIAL DEMURRER FOR LACK OF CAPACITY. SUSTAINED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, AS TO THE SPECIAL DEMURRER FOR DEFECT OF PARTIES. THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT LACK CAPACITY TO SUE. (CCP 430.10(B).) PLAINTIFFS ADMIT THAT THERE IS A DEFECT IN PARTIES AND REQUEST LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADD CHRIS WYMORE AS A PLAINTIFF. THIS REQUEST IS GRANTED. (CCP 430.10(D).) THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED BECAUSE IT IS PROCEDURALLY DEFICIENT. IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION, DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT COMPLIED WITH RULE OF COURT 3.1322(A). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: L. FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on TUE-OCT-01-2013:
Stephen F. Henry, Esq. [510.898.1883] for plaintiff ERIK SWENSON
Richard M. Kelly of Kelly Litigation Group PC [650.591.2282] appearing for defendant MARGARET MINTO

After argument, the Court adopts its tentative ruling: Defendant MARGARET MINTO's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. Defendant Margaret Minto's motion to compel is GRANTED with respect to Special Interrogatories 1, 15, 16, 17 and 18. Special Interrogatories 2, 3, 4, 13, and 14 seek information that is not relevant to the subject matter involved in the pending action or to the determination of any motion made in the action. Order signed in open Court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROMAN SHADE COMPANY OF SAN MATEO, EWM CORPORATION DBA THE ROMAN SHADE COMPANY, MARGARET MINTO and EDGAR MINTO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled as to the general demurrer to the first and second causes of action and the special demurrer for lack of capacity. Sustained, with 10 days leave to amend, as to the special demurrer for defect of parties. The first and second causes of action are adequately pled. Plaintiffs do not lack capacity to sue. (CCP 430.10(b).) Plaintiffs admit that there is a defect in parties and request leave to amend to add Chris Wymore as a plaintiff. This request is granted. (CCP 430.10(d).) The motion to strike is denied because it is procedurally deficient. In the Notice of Motion, Defendants have not complied with Rule of Court 3.1322(a). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ROMAN SHADE COMPANY OF SAN MATEO, EWM CORPORATION DBA THE ROMAN SHADE COMPANY, MARGARET MINTO and EDGAR MINTO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to June 5, 2013 on the Court's motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ROMAN SHADE COMPANY OF SAN MATEO, EWM CORPORATION DBA THE ROMAN SHADE COMPANY, MARGARET MINTO & EDGAR MINTO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT and MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued on the court's own motion to April 16, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 20, 2013 at 4:00 pm. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
